title: -59. Magic Manifestation[ ... words ]
content:
To continue serving our readers, I have removed Korean novels due to copyright issues.

Thank you for your continued support. I'm still working hard to bring you more great novels and the best reading experience possible.

“Old man, you in there—?”

Three days had already passed since I first met Roro Grandpa.

I had come back to his adult shop to report the results of those three days.

“Ohh, you’re still alive, kid.”

“Of course I am… Don’t say stuff like that, it’s creepy…”

I acted tough, but honestly, these past few days I hadn’t felt very alive at all.

For these three days, I’d lived solely for magic training and barely left the house. Still, I never knew when an assassin might come for my life.

For better or worse, I’d been completely absorbed in magic training. Every night I experimented with spells until late, then passed out from exhaustion.

I figured that if someone was going to kill me, they’d probably do it while I was sleeping, so I had Lena stay awake in my place during those hours.

Even so, I’d only averaged about four hours of sleep per night over these three days.

Combined with all the magic experimentation, I now had massive dark circles under my eyes.

“I’m glad the young lady over there is safe too. Though you look pretty beat up… Here, drink this.”

Roro Grandpa grabbed a bottle from the shelf and handed it to me.

“Like a nutritional supplement.”

“I see. Thanks, I’ll take it.”

I accepted the old man’s kindness without hesitation. Without even checking the label, I downed the entire contents in one go.

“Ughhh~… This taste feels nostalgic.”

Even though it was less than 100ml, the rich, heavy flavor lingered in my mouth after I finished. It had that complex taste of dozens of different nutrients mixed together, exactly like a proper nutritional tonic.

“Huh? A young guy like you drinks stuff like this?”

“Sheesh. Back when I was your age, I didn’t need to rely on this junk to stay energetic.”

“I’m not interested in hearing an old man brag about how lively he is.”

I placed the empty bottle on the desk, sat down on the two-seater sofa like before, and took out the book I’d borrowed from my storage bag.

“Here’s your book back, old man.”

“You already finished it?”

“Yeah, more or less.”

“So… you gained something from it?”

“That’s right. I got one result.”

Over these three days, I’d tried everything written in the book Roro Grandpa lent me. In the end, I discovered there was only one magic I could actually use.

“Hoh. And what exactly is this magic you can use?”

“The magic I managed to manifest in these three days is… ‘Weak Point Visualization.’”

“Weak Point Visualization? I don’t remember writing any magic like that.”

“Right, it wasn’t in the book. So I guess it’s my own original magic…”

The trigger for manifesting this magic happened while I was reading the section in the old man’s book about a basic spell that lets you visualize the flow of someone’s magical power.

By concentrating mana around my eyes, I could see the flow of another person’s magic. When I stared intently at Lena while focusing on my eyes, I started to see something like an aura enveloping her body.

As I kept it up, I noticed certain spots on her body glowing.

With her permission, I pressed one of those spots with my finger, and Lena let out a strange voice.

When I touched the glowing spots several more times, even more spots started to light up.

Curious to figure out what they were, I reached out to touch another glowing area—only for Lena to stop me.

After that, she wouldn’t let me touch her anymore, so I reluctantly examined my own body and discovered glowing spots on myself too. I touched one…

“So what happened when you touched them?”

“I can’t say it too loudly, but… it felt really good…”

When I pressed the glowing spots on my own body, pleasure surged through me as if those were my erogenous zones.

Just like with Lena, new glowing spots appeared elsewhere. When I touched those too, waves of pleasure ran through my body again.

“So in other words, this ‘weak point’ magic isn’t about combat weaknesses—it’s a spell that lets you accurately pinpoint someone’s erogenous zones?”

Roro Grandpa, who had been listening seriously, sat there with his mouth hanging open for a while. Lena, who had been beside me the whole time, looked fed up and was only half-listening with one ear.

“…Hah hah hah hah! The only magic you can use is something this perverted?! Kid, you’re one hell of a lecher~!”

“Sh-shut up! I don’t want to hear that from an old geezer like you! Besides, this magic is amazing.”

“Oh? Then tell me how amazing it is.”

“Listen. Like I said, this magic visualizes the opponent’s weak points. That means even if I meet someone for the first time, I can completely captivate them in one shot. And from their perspective, it just looks like I’m casually touching them.”

This wasn’t the fire-spouting magic or spirit-creation magic I’d been hoping for. But with this magic alone, I could make the women of this world mine with just one hand.

In my previous life, I’d read a magazine article saying a man’s worth is decided by the size of his dick, but that was wrong.

No matter how big your “son” is, if you can’t satisfy a woman with it, it’s just a wasted treasure.

What matters is technique.

Whether it’s big or small, if you can properly satisfy a woman, a good relationship will naturally follow.

And with this magic, I had obtained the ultimate technique.

With just my right hand, I could stimulate exactly where she feels good, get her in the mood instantly, and then do whatever I wanted. By the time it was over, she’d be head over heels for my technique.

Whether it was the married woman Lorraine or the feisty adventurer Lisa—it didn’t matter.

Now that I had obtained this power, there was nothing left to fear.
